_notes: r4t harness config — copy to ~/.r4t/harnesses.json and edit (or start from `r4t init`).
This file is the security boundary: it lives OUTSIDE the repo, and only tiers
defined here can run. A roster Harness naming a tier absent from this file fails
closed. Keys starting with _ are ignored everywhere.
{prompt} is replaced with the built prompt as a single argv element — never a shell.
Every key below is optional; the values shown for the governance knobs are the
defaults. See README.md for the knob table and docs/governance.md for why.

leader._notes: Orchestrator tier — Cursor agent CLI, generous limits.

junior-dev._notes: Cheap worker tier — OpenCode with whatever model the repo's opencode.json picks. invoke may also be a POOL (list of argvs) rotated round-robin per turn, e.g. across local models — agents never know which variant ran them.

pins._notes: agent name -> tier. A pinned agent's tier comes from HERE, silently overriding the roster's Harness line — an in-repo roster edit can't upgrade a pinned agent.
